query: INSERT INTO backup_reports (agent_id, repo_id, schedule_id, started_at, finished_at, status, original_size, compressed_size, deduplicated_size, repo_unique_csize, files_processed, duration_secs, error_message, warnings, borg_version, matched, archive_name, borg_command) VALUES ($1, $2, NULL, $3, $4, 'success', 10, 5, 5, 5, 1, 300, NULL, '{}'::text[], NULL, true, $5, NULL)
